reasoning.overallNarrativeArc: Legacy systems drain $4.2M annually -> Cloud migration cuts costs 50% -> Q2 2025 decision window closes for competitive advantage

keyEvidenceChains.evidence: Cloud migration reduced processing costs 50% at peer institutions (Gartner 2024 Report)
keyEvidenceChains.insight: First-movers lock in cost advantages that compound quarterly
keyEvidenceChains.implication: Delay past Q2 2025 creates permanent cost structure disadvantage

keyEvidenceChains.evidence: 73% of mid-tier firms have not started digital transformation pilots (McKinsey Digital Survey)
keyEvidenceChains.insight: Market window exists for second-movers to capture advantage before saturation
keyEvidenceChains.implication: Launch pilot in Q3 2024 to achieve production readiness by Q1 2025

crossSectionConnections: Technology cost savings enable the business case for operational redesign
Operational efficiency gains justify the executive approval timeline
